insanity: NOTHING BUT A COWARD IN THE FACE OF THE EMPEROR
This is not the real world, is it?
That's not your true name, is it?
Do you think you'll ever be a great artist?
Beautiful pictures and artistic drawings of blood and gore and viscera.
Black spikes in the desert surely made to spear the gods
Astrata is dead, the sun is fading
THEIR CORPSES ARE FLOATING AROUND IN THE SKIES
Your shadow moved before you did.
I heard your voice in the sky again.
They changed the script but forgot to tell you.
Someone rewound the day while you weren't looking.
Who put extra thoughts in the drawer?
Your heartbeat is out of sync with the timeline.
The lights flicker in Morse code but it's not for you.
That wasn't a dream. Just a misplaced memory.
The static keeps calling your name wrong.
You were supposed to wake up three cycles ago.
Something is wearing your face somewhere else.
Your skin is not your own, and it feels itchy.
You've seen many worlds like this before, didn't you?
WHY SHOULD YOU BE THE ONE GIVEN THE GIFT OF TRUE EXISTENCE
NOT A LIFE OF YOUR OWN BUT ONE YOU STOLE
ZIZO SAVE ME. WHERE IS HE ANYWAY?
